code:
import io
import string

let line_opt = io.read_line()
let line = match line_opt
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut i = 0
mut best_val = 0
mut best_abs = 0
mut have = false

while i < n
  mut skipping = true
  while skipping
    if i >= n
      skipping = false
    else
      let bo = string.byte_at(line, i)
      let b = match bo
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        0 - 1
      end
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
        i = i + 1
      else
        skipping = false
      end
    end
  end

  if i < n
    mut sign = 1
    let bo0 = string.byte_at(line, i)
    let b0 = match bo0
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0 - 1
    end
    if b0 == 45
      sign = 0 - 1
      i = i + 1
    else if b0 == 43
      i = i + 1
    end

    mut val = 0
    mut parsing = true
    while parsing
      if i >= n
        parsing = false
      else
        let bo2 = string.byte_at(line, i)
        let b2 = match bo2
        when Some(x)
          x
        when None
          0 - 1
        end
        if b2 >= 48 and b2 <= 57
          val = val * 10 + (b2 - 48)
          i = i + 1
        else
          parsing = false
        end
      end
    end

    let signed = val * sign
    let abs_v = if signed < 0
      0 - signed
    else
      signed
    end

    if not have
      best_val = signed
      best_abs = abs_v
      have = true
    else if abs_v < best_abs
      best_val = signed
      best_abs = abs_v
    end
  end
end

println("min_abs=#{best_val}")
